mapper.select: select id, org_code, org_name, account, name, post, duty, secret_post_type, secret_level, work_status, relation_file, submit_progress, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user from tb_secret_personnel where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_secret_personnel(org_code, org_name, account, name, post, duty, secret_post_type, secret_level, work_status, relation_file, submit_progress, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{orgCode}, #{orgName}, #{account}, #{name}, #{post}, #{duty}, #{secretPostType}, #{secretLevel}, #{workStatus}, #{relationFile}, #{submitProgress}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})

insert into tb_secret_personnel(org_code, org_name, account, name, post, duty, secret_post_type, secret_level, work_status, relation_file, submit_progress, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values
(#{entity.orgCode}, #{entity.orgName}, #{entity.account}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.post}, #{entity.duty}, #{entity.secretPostType}, #{entity.secretLevel}, #{entity.workStatus}, #{entity.relationFile}, #{entity.submitProgress}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser})

insert into tb_secret_personnel(org_code, org_name, account, name, post, duty, secret_post_type, secret_level, work_status, relation_file, submit_progress, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values
(#{entity.orgCode}, #{entity.orgName}, #{entity.account}, #{entity.name}, #{entity.post}, #{entity.duty}, #{entity.secretPostType}, #{entity.secretLevel}, #{entity.workStatus}, #{entity.relationFile}, #{entity.submitProgress}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser})
on duplicate key update org_code = values(org_code), org_name = values(org_name), account = values(account), name = values(name), post = values(post), duty = values(duty), secret_post_type = values(secret_post_type), secret_level = values(secret_level), work_status = values(work_status), relation_file = values(relation_file), submit_progress = values(submit_progress), create_time = values(create_time), update_time = values(update_time), create_user = values(create_user), update_user = values(update_user)
mapper.update:
update tb_secret_personnel
org_code = #{orgCode},
org_name = #{orgName},
account = #{account},
name = #{name},
post = #{post},
duty = #{duty},
secret_post_type = #{secretPostType},
secret_level = #{secretLevel},
work_status = #{workStatus},
relation_file = #{relationFile},
submit_progress = #{submitProgress},
create_time = #{createTime},
update_time = #{updateTime},
create_user = #{createUser},
update_user = #{updateUser},
where id = #{id}
